productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland Earthkeepers 2.0 Cupsole Moc Toe Oxford comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style. This pair comes with leather and twill laces that can be used accordingly to suit your style statement.UpperNubuck upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleSynthetic leather lining on the outer and nubuck in the inner along the collarFabric inner lining with suede lining along the back heel for ultimate breathable comfortLeather laces with changable twill laces for a snug, customised Fit in styleEmbossed branding on the lateral heel for styleMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight, shock-absorbing comfortCushioned anti-fatigue footbed with a leather lining on the backfoot with perforations, and Smart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels to offer comfort where it's most neededDurable rubber foxing with a reinforced textured toe box foxingOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern grooves for absolute tractionshoe careUse a nubuck brush to clean the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
